headline: Hershey's and Patrick Renna Spark Nationwide Debate Over How to Make the Perfect S'more
summary: There are two kinds of people in this world when it comes to s'mores. Those who carefully rotate their marshmallow until it's perfectly golden, and those who light it on fire and call it a strategy. This summer, Hershey's is here to let America settle it once and for all.

raw.headline: Hershey's and Patrick Renna Spark Nationwide Debate Over How to Make the Perfect S'more
